features: Feature: Persistent SQLite-backed webhook message queue table to prevent Slack/Teams rate limit blocks
Feature: Background queue batch consumer worker polling at configurable rate intervals (default: 10s)
Feature: Coalescence digest worker grouping multiple notifications into single summary posts
Enhancement: Checked/ignored rows.Close and stmt.Close database return error linter checks
Fix: Fast and standard fmt.Fprintf replacement for WriteString(fmt.Sprintf) in strings builders
